title: Developer Portfolio v2
description: This bilingual portfolio — built with Next.js App Router, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.
longDescription: A fully type-safe, JSON-driven bilingual portfolio with locale detection, smooth page transitions, and a perfect Lighthouse score.

title: Multi-Tenant SaaS Dashboard

title: Open-Source Form Builder
description: A drag-and-drop headless form builder library for React with schema export.
